name: Biscotti Al Formaggio (Cheese Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
Yields 2 dozen cookies
1. Combine cheese and butter with heavy cream, egg, salt, and nutmeg to make dough.
2. Add flour and knead well.
3. Wrap in wax paper and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Roll out dough and cut into thick slices.
5. Baste each cookie slice with egg yolk.
6. Top each cookie with an almond.
7. Bake on a buttered baking sheet at 350°F for 10-12 minutes until golden brown.
